mapper.insert:
/* UsimPrdtMngMapper.usimPrdtHistInsert */ INSERT INTO MSP_M2M_MDL_HIST ( SEQ_NUM , RPRS_PRDT_ID , PRDT_CODE , PRDT_NM , PRDT_DESC , OUT_UNIT_PRIC , USE_YN , UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM , UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM , IMG_FILE , ORG_IMG_FILE , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT SQ_MSP_M2M_MDL_HIST_01.nextVal , RPRS_PRDT_ID , PRDT_CODE , PRDT_NM , PRDT_DESC , OUT_UNIT_PRIC , USE_YN , UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM , UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM , IMG_FILE , (SELECT FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST OFMM WHERE OFMM.ATT_SCTN = 'M2M' AND OFMM.ORGN_ID = A.RPRS_PRDT_ID) AS ORG_IMG_FILE , #{sessionUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE , #{sessionUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE
FROM MSP_M2M_MDL A WHERE RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT /* UsimPrdtMngMapper.getImageFile */ ATT_ROUT /* 파일경로 */ , FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ , FILE_ID /* 파일ID */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST OFMM WHERE OFMM.ATT_SCTN = 'M2M' AND OFMM.ORGN_ID = #{rprsPrdtId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY OFMM.REG_DTTM
